{ "name": "@babel/helper-globals", "version": "7.28.0", "author": "The Babel Team (https://babel.dev/team)", "license": "MIT", "description": "A collection of JavaScript globals for Babel internal usage", "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "https://github.com/babel/babel.git", "directory": "packages/babel-helper-globals" }, "publishConfig": { "access": "public" }, "exports": { "./data/browser-upper.json": "./data/browser-upper.json", "./data/builtin-lower.json": "./data/builtin-lower.json", "./data/builtin-upper.json": "./data/builtin-upper.json", "./package.json": "./package.json" }, "keywords": [ "babel", "globals" ], "devDependencies": { "globals": "^16.1.0" }, "engines": { "node": ">=6.9.0" }, "type": "commonjs" }
